calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Thomas A.E. Hesketh, Esq. appeared for plaintiff DCFS USA, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Edson A. Dore.
Default was entered against defendant June 12, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 12, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at the default prove-up hearing was filed on August 31, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff DCFS USA, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Edson A. Dore as follows:

Damages/Principal - $33,994.74.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,819.96.
Attorney's Fees - $3,399.47.
Costs - $445.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $40,659.17.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Continued To Sep-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
